summary: Implementation plan for 14 accepted CLI→MCP→Agent chain optimization recommendations, grouped into 7 cohesive tasks covering: server hot-path cache unification, MCP 2025-06-18 tool conformance, security/compliance feedback, CLI reorganization with new fab update command, pre-commit fast-skip, dashboard SSE resilience, and MCP Resources/Notifications primitives. All tasks except TASK-007 are fully parallel; TASK-007 depends on TASK-001 to leverage the unified cache watcher for notification dispatch.
approach: Group 14 recommendations by feature/module boundary into 7 tasks of 20-60 min each, sized to be independently executable by parallel agents. High-priority Quick Wins (Rec#1-4) are distributed across TASK-001, TASK-002, TASK-003 which can all run concurrently. Medium tasks (Rec#5-11) are spread across TASK-003, TASK-004, TASK-005, TASK-006. Strategic tasks (Rec#12-14) are unified in TASK-007 as a single MCP protocol extension effort. Execute TASK-001 through TASK-006 in parallel first; TASK-007 follows TASK-001.
estimated_time: 5-7 hours total (parallel execution: ~3 hours wall-clock with 3 concurrent agents on TASK-001/002/003; TASK-004/005/006 in second wave; TASK-007 after TASK-001)

design_decisions.decision: Merge Rec#1 + Rec#2 + Rec#13 into TASK-001 as unified ContextCache
design_decisions.rationale: conclusions.json explicitly marks Rec#13 as a 'unification/refactor task if Rec#1 & Rec#2 already land'; shared chokidar watcher and single invalidation point reduce implementation complexity
design_decisions.tradeoff: Larger initial change vs three separate PRs; offset by eliminating duplicate watcher hookup

design_decisions.decision: Merge Rec#3 + Rec#6 + Rec#7 into TASK-002 (all 4 tool files touched in one pass)
design_decisions.rationale: All 4 tool files share the same createTextResponse anti-pattern; outputSchema pass naturally co-locates with description/schema fixes in plan-context and update-registry
design_decisions.tradeoff: paths.min(2) is a validation tightening that may affect existing agent prompts using single-path plan-context calls

design_decisions.rationale: Resource/notification triggers wire into ContextCache file-watch events from TASK-001; outputSchema shapes from TASK-002 are independent of resource URI design
design_decisions.tradeoff: TASK-007 cannot start until TASK-001 is complete; acceptable given TASK-007 is low-priority strategic work

design_decisions.decision: TASK-005 (pre-commit) and TASK-006 (dashboard SSE) are standalone tasks with no dependencies
design_decisions.rationale: Both are fully self-contained changes with no shared code paths to other tasks; isolating them maximizes parallel execution opportunities

data_flow.diagram: CLI (pre-commit fast-skip) → Server (ContextCache layer) → MCP Tools (outputSchema + auth) → Agent (compliance feedback) → Dashboard (SSE resilience) → MCP Resources/Notifications (push updates)

stages.input: git staged files, agents.meta.json, MCP host config
stages.output: Updated CLI commands, fast pre-commit exit for non-fabric commits
ContextCache with TTL/watcher invalidation; O(1) audit reads
Structured tool responses with outputSchema; authenticated /mcp endpoint; compliance in append-intent response

stages.input: SSE event stream with IDs, Last-Event-ID header
stages.output: Reconnect-safe SSE with ring buffer replay and auth

stages.input: ContextCache file-watch events, AGENTS.md, agents.meta.json changes
stages.output: MCP resource subscription; push notifications to all active sessions

dependencies: TASK-007 depends on TASK-001 (ContextCache watcher as notification trigger)
TASK-001 through TASK-006 are fully independent and parallel

conventions: packages/shared for cross-package types — add new shared types there
CLI commands in packages/cli/src/commands/ — register in index.ts
MCP tools in packages/server/src/tools/ — register in server setup
No readFileSync in async hot paths
FABRIC_AUTH_TOKEN env var gates bearer auth; all auth checks must be conditional on its presence

quality_check.notes: All 14 recommendations covered across 7 tasks. Each task 20-60 min scope. Dependencies verified non-circular. All convergence criteria are quantified and testable. Implementation steps 4-7 per task. No readFileSync, no hardcoded auth, conditional bearer auth pattern preserved.
